description: Turn agent-reliability-kit into the flagship AI-agent reliability entry point, with agent-secret-guard as the security wedge and local MVPs for team audit, private MCP registry, n8n safety/backup, AI cost guard, and launch distribution materials.

userStories.title: Local team audit MVP
userStories.description: As a team lead, I want local scan history, policy checks, audit exports, and a dry-run Slack payload so I can evaluate team readiness without a hosted service.

userStories.title: Private MCP registry and allowlist
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want MCP config files checked against approved servers, permissions, trust score, commands, URLs, owners, and reasons.

userStories.title: n8n safety and redacted backup
userStories.description: As a self-hosted automation user, I want dangerous n8n workflow exports detected and redacted backups written to a Git-friendly directory.

userStories.title: AI cost guard
userStories.description: As an agent user, I want local JSON/JSONL traces summarized by provider/model with budget alerts.

userStories.title: Distribution and commercial packaging
userStories.description: As an open-source maintainer, I want README, docs, comparison pages, launch copy, and commercial support notes that make the product easy to understand and promote.
